comment: Maps Discord author IDs to per-principal EA partitions and binds each partition to its principal display name, per-EA Anthropic key vault reference, and per-EA Claude agent name (Migration Plan §14.2.4 + §14.4.3; architecture v2.1 §2.2.4). Each partition lives at state/eas/<partition>/. Unmapped author IDs produce an audit-logged refusal rather than silent default routing (Δ D-015 / Migration Plan §14.2.1). Sarah's Discord author ID 1495747655152701547 mapped to the sarah partition 2026-04-30 (Phase J.1b §14.4.4 closure). Per OD-038 spawned-worker attribution per OD-012a, the per-EA Anthropic key vault reference is consumed by the worker spawn path; the operator rotated Quinn's runtime key on 2026-04-30 and stored the fresh value at op://CoS-Dispatcher/quinn-runtime/credential.
